headline: Broadcom’s OCI Push Puts AI Data Center Role In Focus
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced a 400G/lane optical DSP and is leading the new Optical Compute Interconnect, or OCI, open standard alongside AMD, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, and OpenAI. The company is also working with JetCool and Flex to bring production-ready liquid cooling solutions into AI data center deployments. These developments aim to support hyperscalable AI clusters with multivendor optical connectivity and advanced thermal management. Broadcom is widely known for its...

headline: Goldman: Software giants face ‘radical transformation’ as agentic AI rises
summary: Investing.com -- The software sector, once the primary engine of global digital transformation, is facing a significant challenge as "agentic" artificial intelligence tools threaten to disrupt established business models. According to a new Goldman Sachs "Top of Mind" report, the rise of AI capable of autonomous software development has fueled investor fears that the technology may "eat" the very industry that pioneered it, leading to a sharp re-rating of software stocks.
